copy.description:
Select Board Work Session - June 16, 2026

During the Select Board Work Session on June 16, 2026, the board discussed various topics, including the postponement of agenda item 1B for further discussion [01:26]. They reviewed the minutes from the previous meeting and registered multiple committee vacancies, notably in the Disability Commission [17:40]. There was discourse on the need for a new advisory committee to enhance civic engagement and public input in decision-making [198:15].

Moments:
0:52 — My vote.
1:40 — Yeah, I'd like to just pull up and really discuss but just…
3:24 — Yeah, had we had the override not passed we we we didn't…
5:02 — And then regarding 1R, so 1R proposes approval of a design…
5:53 — How long does that normally take?
7:38 — Uh so, I'm going to amend then my motion. So, one approval, I…
10:20 — All right. So, with that we were mid-vote. Bernard voted yes.…
12:10 — You know, we could draft a motion that basically says if places…
14:03 — But the board did ask that anyone wanting to stay open until…
14:12 — So, theoretically some places can stay open until 2:00, but in…
15:15 — All right, so I move approval of authorizing holders of…
15:51 — The only other thing I would just add to your note is that if…
1:02:34 — Right, I worry about that, too. I'm actually less concerned…
1:32:06 — Um so there I'm I'm concerned about in the first in the first…
2:51:48 — showing zero um capacity zero to one kilowatt. And you might…

Full program and record at the station. Assembled from the transcript.
